channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sweating Isn't the Only Indicator of Effective Strength Training
item.description: The article explores the misconception that sweating during strength training is a reliable measure of workout effectiveness. Experts explain that sweating is primarily a cooling mechanism, not an ind...

item.title: Chiltern Vital Group and Cambridge Atomworks to Build Odin Microreactor Prototype at Berkeley Site
item.description: A significant development in nuclear energy innovation is unfolding as Chiltern Vital Group (CVG) and Cambridge Atomworks have signed a letter of intent to construct the Odin microreactor prototype on...

item.title: Philippines commemorates 10th anniversary of West Philippine Sea arbitral ruling
item.description: The Subic Bay Metropolitan Authority (SBMA) chair, Eduardo Jose Aliño, highlighted the significance of the 2016 arbitral ruling in the West Philippine Sea as a 'beacon of hope' during a commemorative ...

item.title: Springboks' Tactical Versatility and Quan Horn's Adaptability Secured Victory Against Scotland
item.description: The Springboks showcased their tactical versatility during a crucial match against Scotland, with coach Rassie Erasmus opting for a 6-2 bench split that tested the adaptability of his players. Key sub...

item.title: South Africa investigates Interpol fugitive Ndodana Tshuma's entry and arrest
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) is conducting an investigation into how Interpol fugitive Ndodana Tshuma, accused of murdering his wife and two children in England, may have entered South Afri...

item.title: Great British Energy Seeks SMR Partner for £1.08 Billion Contract
item.description: Great British Energy – Nuclear, a state-backed company, is seeking a delivery partner for its small modular reactor (SMR) programme through a £1.08 billion procurement contract. The successful applica...

item.title: Amanda Holden shares her diet, fitness routine and approach to maintaining a healthy lifestyle at 55

item.description: Basketball players in Tanzania’s Dar es Salaam League are set to receive significant financial rewards after sports betting company betPawa renewed its sponsorship deal for the 2026 season. The agreem...

item.title: Fishermen's Struggles Continue Despite Legal Victory in West Philippine Sea
item.description: Ten years after the 2016 arbitral ruling in the West Philippine Sea, Filipino fishermen continue to face harassment from Chinese vessels, despite the legal victory. Ryan Jacinto, a 43-year-old fisherm...

item.description: A shooting incident occurred at the Salsa on St. Clair festival in Toronto, resulting in two fatalities and multiple injuries. The event, which celebrated Latin culture, was attended by approximately ...

item.title: Mother Battles Stage Four Brain Cancer After Premature Birth
item.description: Amy Carroll, a 34-year-old mother from Northampton, faced a life-altering diagnosis during her fourth pregnancy. Initially experiencing dizziness and fainting, she was diagnosed with gestational diabe...

item.title: Australian universities to publish executive salaries and consultancy spending under new governance standards
item.description: Australian universities will be required to publish detailed financial information, including consultancy spending, executive salaries, and governance meeting decisions, under new federal standards. T...

item.title: Pakistan secures three bronze medals in 56th International Physics Olympiad

item.title: Political clash as Umahi dismisses Obi's election fears
item.description: Minister of Works, David Umahi, has rejected claims by former Anambra State governor Peter Obi that his life is in danger ahead of the 2027 general election. Umahi stated that Obi would be alive to co...

item.title: AI and Quantum Computing Advance Drug Development by Creating New Peptides

item.title: The GOP's Cover-Up and Political Distrust in Modern America
item.description: The article critiques the Republican Party's alleged cover-ups and the erosion of public trust in political institutions. It highlights how figures like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have become sy...

item.title: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, Close Trump Ally, Dies at 71
item.description: Lindsey Graham, a U.S. Republican senator and close ally of former President Donald Trump, has died at the age of 71 following a brief illness. His office confirmed his passing on social media, statin...

item.title: Katie George: Sportscaster's Career, Marriage, and Achievements
item.description: Katie George is a renowned American sportscaster known for her versatility in covering multiple sports like college football, Formula 1, NBA, and volleyball. Born on December 3, 1993, in Louisville, K...
